name: Tax-Free Assumption of Liabilities

eligibility.description: Liabilities must not exceed the adjusted basis of transferred property and must have a bona fide business purpose.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a corporation to assume a transferor's liabilities in a Section 351 or 361 exchange without the assumption being treated as taxable 'boot' or money received.
